values.title: Cornerstone Construction
values.hero_description: With over 25 years of experience, Cornerstone Construction delivers exceptional commercial and residential construction services. From concept to completion, we build structures that stand the test of time.
values.cta_description: Whether you're planning a new commercial development, home renovation, or industrial facility, our experienced team is ready to bring your vision to life.

values.title: Riverside Plaza Commercial Center
values.body:
A 120,000 sq ft mixed-use commercial development featuring retail spaces, offices, and a rooftop terrace. This LEED Gold-certified project showcases our commitment to sustainable building practices.

Project Highlights

  • 120,000 sq ft mixed-use space
  • LEED Gold certification
  • Underground parking for 200 vehicles
  • Green roof with native plantings

values.title: Oakwood Estates Residential Development
values.body:
A luxury residential community of 45 custom homes built with premium materials and energy-efficient designs. Each home features smart home technology and modern architectural styling.

Project Highlights

  • 45 custom luxury homes
  • Energy Star certified construction
  • Smart home integration
  • Community amenities including pool and clubhouse

values.title: Summit Medical Center Expansion
values.body:
A 60,000 sq ft medical facility expansion including new surgical suites, imaging center, and patient recovery wings. Built to strict healthcare construction standards with minimal disruption to existing operations.

Project Highlights

  • 60,000 sq ft healthcare facility
  • State-of-the-art surgical suites
  • Advanced HVAC and air filtration
  • Completed on time during active hospital operations

values.title: Greenfield Distribution Warehouse
values.body:
A 200,000 sq ft distribution warehouse featuring advanced logistics infrastructure, automated loading docks, and sustainable design elements including solar panel arrays.

Project Highlights

  • 200,000 sq ft distribution center
  • 24 automated loading docks
  • 500kW rooftop solar array
  • Temperature-controlled storage zones

values.title: Commercial Construction
values.body:
From office buildings and retail centers to hotels and restaurants, our commercial construction team delivers projects on time and within budget. We handle everything from ground-up construction to tenant improvements.

What We Offer

  • Ground-up commercial construction
  • Tenant improvements and build-outs
  • Design-build services
  • Pre-construction planning and estimating
  • Sustainable and LEED-certified building

values.title: Residential Construction
values.body:
Build your dream home with our expert residential construction team. From luxury custom homes to multi-family developments, we bring craftsmanship and attention to detail to every project.

What We Offer

  • Custom home building
  • Multi-family housing developments
  • Home additions and expansions
  • Kitchen and bathroom remodeling
  • Energy-efficient and smart home upgrades

values.title: Renovation & Remodeling
values.body:
Transform existing spaces with our renovation and remodeling expertise. Whether it's a historic building restoration or modern office renovation, we preserve what matters while upgrading functionality.

What We Offer

  • Historic building restoration
  • Office and commercial renovations
  • Seismic retrofitting
  • ADA compliance upgrades
  • Interior and exterior remodeling

values.title: Industrial Construction
values.body:
We specialize in constructing warehouses, manufacturing plants, and distribution centers that meet the demanding requirements of modern industry. Our industrial projects emphasize durability, efficiency, and scalability.

What We Offer

  • Warehouse and distribution centers
  • Manufacturing facilities
  • Cold storage and food processing plants
  • Industrial maintenance and upgrades
  • Environmental compliance construction

values.title: Mike Johnson
values.body: Mike founded Cornerstone Construction in 1999 with a vision to deliver exceptional construction services. With over 30 years of industry experience, he leads the company with a commitment to quality, safety, and client satisfaction.

values.title: Maria Rodriguez
values.body: Maria oversees all construction operations, ensuring projects are delivered on time, within budget, and to the highest quality standards. Her expertise in project management and lean construction practices drives operational excellence.

values.title: David Chen
values.body: David leads our estimating and pre-construction team, providing accurate cost projections and value engineering solutions. His background in civil engineering and construction management ensures every project starts on a solid foundation.

values.title: Outstanding Commercial Project
values.body: Cornerstone Construction delivered our commercial center on time and under budget. Their attention to detail and proactive communication throughout the project made the entire process seamless. We couldn't be happier with the results.

values.title: Dream Home Realized
values.body: Working with the Cornerstone team to build our custom home was an incredible experience. They listened to our vision, offered expert guidance, and the craftsmanship is outstanding. Our home exceeded every expectation.

values.title: Professional Healthcare Construction
values.body: The expansion of our medical center was a complex project requiring construction during active operations. Cornerstone handled it flawlessly, minimizing disruption to our patients and staff while delivering a world-class facility.

values.title: About Cornerstone Construction
values.body:
Founded in 1999, Cornerstone Construction has grown from a small general contracting firm to one of the Pacific Northwest's most trusted construction companies. We specialize in commercial, residential, and industrial construction projects that transform communities.

Our Mission

To deliver exceptional construction services that exceed client expectations through quality craftsmanship, innovative solutions, and unwavering commitment to safety and sustainability.

Our Values

  • Quality - We never compromise on materials or workmanship
  • Safety - Zero incidents is our daily goal
  • Integrity - We do what we say and stand behind our work
  • Innovation - We embrace new technologies and methods

Certifications

We are licensed, bonded, and insured. Our team holds certifications in LEED construction, OSHA safety, and numerous trade specialties.

values.title: Contact Us
values.body:
